titleStmt.title: SII 27.84: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 84. (A.R. No. 339 of 1931-32.) MAṆIPURA, UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: This slightly damaged record states that since Hosabu-mūli was unjustly killed by the king's servants, Daṇḍappa-adhikāri who was governing the Karakaḷasthala-nāḍu along with the mūḍilas, Māramaheggaḍe, the eight jananis and the thirty-two of the sabhe, granted land to the family of the deceased, at the instance of mahāpradhāna Bāchaṇṇa-oḍeya who was governing Bārakūru-rājya.

The record is dated Śaka 1330, Sarvajit, Jyēsṭha śu., the tithi and weekday being lost. The Śaka year was current and the tithi in the bright half of the month would fall sometimes, in May-June, 1407 A.D.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ya namastuṁga śirastuṁbi
cāravē . trayilōkya nagarāraṁbhaṁ mū
svastiśrī rājādhirāja rāja paramēśvara śrī vīradēva
rāya rājyapaṭṭa Uttarōttarābhivriddhi pravarddhamānamāca
ṁdrārka tāraṁbaraṁ saluttirddu śakavaruṣa 1330 sarvvajitu saṁ jē
ṣṭa su śrīma mahāpradhāna bācaṁṇa Oḍeyarū bārakū
ra rājyavanū pratipālisuva kāladalū Ā bācaṁṇa Oḍeyara
ṁ bayala dēvaranū Aṁnyāyadali hāyidu hi
ḍidu koṁḍu hōha Aḷidāyeṁdu māṇisu va hosabu mo
yaliyanū Aṁnyāyadali Arasinabaṁṭarū koṁda saṁma
ṁdha Ā bācaṁṇna Oḍeyara nirūpadiṁ karakaḷadastaḷada nāḍanāḷu
va daṁḍappa Adhikārigaḷu mūḍilaru mārama heggaḍeyarū
Abaḷi sāviradavarū ṁbayala yeṁṭumaṁdi janani
nigaḷu mūvatteraḍumaṁdi sabheyū muṁtāgi hosabu
mūliya kuṭuṁbadavarige koṭṭa śilāsasanada kramaveṁteṁ
daḍe Ā hosabu mūliya maneyiṁdaṁ paḍuvaṇa beṭṭu koḍa
gittavanoṭeṁ teṁkalu kaṭṭida gōḷi baḍaga śeṁciṁ baḍagalu
maṭhada tōṭaṁ mūḍalu mūḍaṇa Ōṇiṁ paḍuvalu yi
catusīme Oḷaguḷa beṭṭu hoḷeya taḍiyabayala kōṭiya
gadde yaṣṭaṟoḷage haṁnoṁdu tārada modalanū
kāḍuganettiya baḷiya hosabumūliya kuṭuṁbada
varige Ācaṁdrārkastāyiyāgi Abāḷige sarvvamāṁnya
vāgi koṭṭeU yaṁtappudakke bācaṁṇna Oḍeyara suha
sta doppa yiśasanada kalliṁge Aḷusidavarige vāraṇāsiya
liṁ sāvirakapile bāhmara koṁḍapāpa
Digital edition of SII 27.84 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
